title: Crypto companies have tightened compliance, but gaps remain: Chainalysis
summary: Around 47% of crypto organizations onboarded in 2026 are operating at alerting standards that would have ranked among the industry’s strictest five years ago.

title: Crypto markets shed $80B after fresh US strikes on Iran
summary: The crypto market capitalization has fallen to its lowest level since mid-April after the US carried out strikes on Iran for the second time in three days amid peace talks.

title: Stocks Slip as Mideast Flare-Up Lifts Oil, Yields: Markets Wrap
summary: Stocks fell while oil and bond yields climbed after fresh attacks in the Middle East fueled doubts over whether an end to the war is imminent.

title: Protestas en Bolivia desploman sus bonos soberanos y amenazan con caos
summary: Bolivia vuelve a encender las alarmas. Las protestas y bloqueos ya afectan el abastecimiento en La Paz y desploman su imagen internacional, mientras crece la presión sobre el presidente Rodrigo Paz apenas meses después de asumir el poder.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CFTC, Gemini File Joint Motion to Reverse $5M Settlement
summary: The regulator filed alongside the crypto exchange to undo a 2025 consent order it now says "should not have been filed."

title: AI Chatbots Could Quietly Pull Users Away From Reality, Researchers Warn
summary: Researchers warn that prolonged chatbot interactions could distort how some users experience reality and social connection.

title: Samsung units to acquire $408 million stake in Upbit operator Dunamu
summary: Major institutions in South Korea are seeking to expand into digital assets in preparation for the upcoming regulatory framework for crypto.

title: Bit Digital extends $100 million loan facility to WhiteFiber, backed by Ethereum credit line
summary: Bit Digital said advances may be funded through an Ethereum-denominated secured credit facility, letting it retain ETH exposure.

title: US and Iran exchange fire amid increasingly strained truce
summary: Official says American forces shot down Iranian drones in move that prompted retaliation from Tehran

title: Trump says rising economic costs will not force him into Iran deal
summary: President’s comments come as hopes of an agreement to end the war push oil prices lower
